title: Outdated OpenSSL on local nginx demo
description: The local nginx demo image ships OpenSSL 3.0.x with a known LOW-severity issue. Upgrade to the latest 3.0 patch for the lab.
remediation: Rebuild the demo image with the latest nginx:1.27-alpine tag.

title: Missing Content-Security-Policy header on /
description: The local demo lab does not return a Content-Security-Policy header, which is a defense-in-depth gap.
remediation: Add a strict CSP to the demo nginx config (Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self').

title: Hardcoded password assignment in demo app
description: Bandit flagged a hardcoded password string in the demo app's config loader.
remediation: Load secrets from the environment or a secrets manager; never from source.

title: Use of eval() in user-facing helper
description: Semgrep rule python.lang.security.audit.eval matched an eval() call in the demo app.
remediation: Replace eval() with a safe parser; never evaluate untrusted input.

title: Outbound SSH service fingerprint detected
description: Nmap observed an SSH banner on port 22/TCP during the local lab scan.
remediation: Confirm the SSH service is required; restrict source addresses.

title: Vulnerable dependency: requests < 2.31.0
description: pip-audit reports PYSEC-2023-74 in the local lab's pinned requests package.

title: Cookie missing Secure attribute
description: The local lab sets a session cookie without the Secure attribute.
remediation: Add the Secure attribute to all session cookies served by the lab.
